 {"id":"brenner_bot-5so.6.4","title":"Memory: operational workflow (cm playbook + outcomes)","description":"# Goal
Define how we actually *use* cass-memory day-to-day in this repo:
- how the playbook is seeded / curated
- when to run `cm context` and what to inject
- how to record outcomes (`cm outcome ...`)
- how to avoid memory pollution and over-conditioning

---

# Acceptance
- Operators have a concrete checklist for using cm in a session.
- We have a plan for seeding initial rules without vendor APIs.
","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2025-12-29T21:07:45.386313425-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-29T21:07:45.386313425-05:00","labels":["cass","memory"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-5so.6.4","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-5so.6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-29T21:07:45.416664938-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"brenner_bot-5so.6.4.1","title":"Seed initial cm playbook categories for Brenner Loop","description":"# Goal
Define an initial taxonomy of cm playbook categories that match Brenner Bot workflows.

Suggested categories:
- protocol-kernel
- prompt-hygiene
- evidence-per-week
- thread-operations
- artifact-compilation
- safety-and-gating

# Acceptance
- A human can add the first handful of rules without guesswork.
","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-29T21:07:57.982605612-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-30T02:19:40.058033156-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-30T02:19:40.058033156-05:00","close_reason":"Added recommended cm playbook categories + examples to cockpit runbook","labels":["cm","design","memory"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-5so.6.4.1","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-5so.6.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-29T21:07:58.011282222-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"brenner_bot-5so.6.4.2","title":"Write operator checklist for cm context injection","description":"# Goal
Define the practical checklist for using memory in a session:
- when to run `cm context`
- recommended defaults (`--no-history`, small `--limit`)
- where to insert in prompt (dedicated MEMORY CONTEXT section)
- provenance labeling + anti-pattern warnings

# Acceptance
- Runbook contains a copy/paste snippet for memory injection.

Specify when and how we mark outcomes in cass-memory:
- what counts as “success” vs “harmful”
- which bullet IDs to mark
- how to write a summary so future context is useful

# Acceptance
- Runbook includes one concrete example of recording an outcome.

 {"id":"brenner_bot-5so.6.5","title":"Episodic capture: make sessions indexable by cass","description":"# Goal
Ensure that the *durable* outputs of sessions (threads + artifacts) are searchable later via `cass`.

This can be done by:
- pointing cass at the Agent Mail archive directory, OR
- exporting threads into a cass-indexed location, OR
- persisting key artifacts in-repo and ensuring cass indexes the repo.

---

# Why
`cm` becomes more valuable as the underlying episodic corpus improves.

---

# Acceptance
- We have a clear, practical recommendation for how to make Brenner Bot sessions discoverable in cass searches.
","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2025-12-29T21:08:22.983425673-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-29T21:08:22.983425673-05:00","labels":["cass","design","memory"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-5so.6.5","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-5so.6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-29T21:08:23.013793206-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"brenner_bot-5so.6.5.1","title":"Investigate cass indexing options for Agent Mail + repo artifacts","description":"# Goal
Answer concretely:
- can `cass` index the Agent Mail archive directories?
- if yes, what config is needed?
- if no, what export format/path would work?

# Acceptance
- A short note with the recommended approach + any required setup steps.
","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-29T21:08:30.555010962-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-29T21:08:30.555010962-05:00","labels":["cass","investigation"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-5so.6.5.1","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-5so.6.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-29T21:08:30.584237948-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"brenner_bot-5so.6.5.2","title":"Document recommended cass integration approach","description":"# Goal
Write a small doc section describing:
- what gets indexed
- where it lives
- how to keep the index current

# Acceptance
- Future-self can run a cass search and find past Brenner Bot sessions.
","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-29T21:08:33.357957101-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-29T21:08:33.357957101-05:00","labels":["cass","docs"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-5so.6.5.2","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-5so.6.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-29T21:08:33.378246002-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-5so.6.5.2","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-5so.6.5.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T21:08:33.384966412-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
